query:
SELECT DISTINCT bi2.description, bi2.accountCode, COUNT(*) as count
FROM billing_items bi1
JOIN billing_items bi2 ON bi1.contactName = bi2.contactName
WHERE bi1.description LIKE '%SmileTel supplied NBN%' 
   OR bi1.description LIKE '%Site Bundle%'
GROUP BY bi2.description, bi2.accountCode
ORDER BY count DESC
LIMIT 20;

SELECT DISTINCT bi2.description, bi2.accountCode, COUNT(*) as count
FROM billing_items bi1
JOIN billing_items bi2 ON bi1.contactName = bi2.contactName
WHERE bi1.description LIKE '%SmileTel supplied NBN%' 
   OR bi1.description LIKE '%Site Bundle%'
GROUP BY bi2.description, bi2.accountCode
ORDER BY count DESC
LIMIT 20;
